ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_listings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job listing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "job_link" TEXT /* Link to the job application page */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range offered for the job */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags associated with the job listing */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job belongs to */,
  "work_mode" TEXT /* Work mode (e.g., remote, on-site, hybrid) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the hiring manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the hiring manager */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_listings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarter */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for recruitment */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., job seeker, employer) */,
  "resume_link" TEXT /* Link to the user's resume or CV */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's location */,
  "preferred_location" TEXT /* Preferred location for job search */,
  "preferred_salary" TEXT /* Preferred salary range for job search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the application is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted with the application */,
  "cv_submission_date" TEXT /* Date the CV was submitted */,
  "referred_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who referred the candidate */,
  "referred_by_email" TEXT /* Email of the person who referred the candidate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_listings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the interview is for */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the interviewer */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the interview */,
  "interview_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the candidate during the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., skill, experience, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the user, comma-separated */,
  "experiences" TEXT /* Experiences of the user, formatted as a description */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the user */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the user */,
  "projects" TEXT /* Notable projects completed by the user */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the user */,
  "portfolio_link" TEXT /* Link to the user's portfolio or personal website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "action_link" TEXT /* Link to take action related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
